status_detail: Test could not target chat.baidu.com reliably. Clipboard content from this run is essentially the same HuggingFace chat sidebar captured in #502 (lists 'New Chat', 'Capital of France', 'jhee28', 'Get PRO', 'Model'). This strongly suggests Chrome restored the previous HuggingFace tab after Stop-Process and the new baidu tab either (a) did not receive focus, or (b) was opened as an additional tab while Ctrl+A was applied to the restored HF tab, or (c) baidu was blocked/failed to load and focus remained on HF. Screenshot sizes did change across stages (105->100->83 KB) so something rendered, but without reliable isolation this result cannot be used to validate the domain_patterns update for chat.baidu.com.
notes_for_dev: Test invalidated by Chrome session restore / tab isolation problem. Recommended fix in test-pc-worker: (1) Launch Chrome with --new-window --incognito --no-first-run so no previous session tabs are restored, (2) Before Ctrl+A ensure the intended tab is focused by Ctrl+L (address bar) → verify URL → Tab back into page, (3) For baidu specifically, validate that the Etap proxy actually routes chat.baidu.com (previous issue was that only yiyan.baidu.com was in domain_patterns; the domain_patterns update for chat.baidu.com cannot be confirmed by this run). Please resend as a fresh request after the test harness is hardened, or run a one-off manual verification via AnyDesk.
retry_context: Retry of #499 after domain_patterns updated to include chat.baidu.com and reload_services executed.
